Challenge1.title: Explore the DXC Enterprise Prompt Library and submit your best prompt
Challenge1.description: Go to the DXC Enterprise Prompt Library (https://prompts.dxc.ai/) and explore the available prompts. Use the filters to narrow down your search, including by function, industry, and model. Once you have explored the library, submit a new prompt that your colleagues could use. Note: the prompt should be useful to your team, department or function. Comment with a screenshot of your submitted prompt on Viva Engage.
